final:
module top_module(
    input [3:0] negative_binary,
    output reg [3:0] twos_complement_output
);always @(*) begin
        if (negative_binary[3] == 1) begin
            twos_complement_output = ~negative_binary + 1;
        end else begin
            twos_complement_output = negative_binary;
        end
    end

endmodule
